title: Ludhiana、Punjab — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Ludhiana、Punjab的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Ludhiana是Punjab的一個城市，人口約1,650,000。The industrial hub of Punjab, known for its bicycle, auto parts, and hosiery manufacturing, and vibrant Punjabi culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
